purpose: Body region taxonomy for large-mask body-shape and proportion correction.

regions.label: Torso global
regions.description: Chest-to-hip body block used only for coarse silhouette rebalance.

regions.label: Abdomen / stomach
regions.description: Stomach profile, belly contour, abdominal volume, and front torso plane.

regions.label: Left waist
regions.description: Left-side waist curve and silhouette transition into hip.

regions.label: Right waist
regions.description: Right-side waist curve and silhouette transition into hip.

regions.label: Hips / pelvis
regions.description: Hip width, pelvis shape, and lower torso balance.

regions.label: Left thigh
regions.description: Upper leg silhouette, volume, taper, and skin continuity.

regions.label: Right thigh
regions.description: Upper leg silhouette, volume, taper, and skin continuity.

regions.label: Outer silhouette
regions.description: Body-edge contour used for silhouette correction and crop-boundary checks.

regions.label: Clothing pressure boundary
regions.description: Edges where fabric, waistband, or clothing shape changes body silhouette.

regions.label: Skin texture preserve zone
regions.description: Non-shape region used to preserve texture continuity during reshape.

regions.label: Hands/contact exclusion
regions.description: Hands, props, and contact areas excluded unless separately planned.

hard_rules: Shape masks must be owned by a single character instance.
Large body masks must not include face identity regions unless explicitly requested by another pass.
Left/right paired regions must be balanced by QA, not independently overcorrected.
Any large silhouette change must trigger character-count, crop, pose, and clothing-continuity QA.
